description: External skill-server repositories that `solomon-harness skills` can pull agent skills from. Each source is a git repository. A skill is either a folder containing SKILL.md (skill name = folder name) or a Markdown file under a 'skills' directory (skill name = file stem). Edit this list to add your own sources.

sources.name: anthropic-skills
sources.note: Anthropic's public Agent Skills. Adjust the URL if the repository moves.
